name: Grace's Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the sugar, baking powder, salt, melted butter, nutmeg, and ginger.
3. Gradually add the milk to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Sift in the all-purpose flour and stir until a smooth dough forms.
5. Dust a clean surface with flour and roll out the dough to 1/2 inch thickness, sprinkling with a little nutmeg.
6. Use a doughnut cutter to cut out shapes.
7. Let the doughnuts stand for 1 hour covered with a linen towel.
8. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Carefully lower the doughnuts into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
10. Remove the doughnuts from the oil using tongs and shake off excess fat.
11. Place the doughnuts on a plate lined with paper towels.
12. Sprinkle generously with cinnamon and granulated sugar (or confectioners' sugar).
